steps.title: Identify the date constraint
steps.content: The statement requires an example of hoards discovered before 2000. This is the decisive filter for the correct answer.

steps.title: Test each choice
steps.content:
The matching choice lists Dunmore (1896) and Loughrea (1940) with accurate dates from the table. The other choices contain factual errors, include the post-2000 year 2001, or claim a frequency not supported by the data.
D is correct.
